summary: Frontend-only regression test of /admin/outreach/activity card-based layout on desktop (1920x900) and mobile (390x844). All scenarios from the review request pass — no horizontal overflow on mobile, cards render fully within viewport, tab switching, search filter, refresh button and back link all work as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: QuoteCard key uses `${q.paper_id}-${q.handle}-${q.quote_tweet_id}` which may collide if quote_tweet_id is null for duplicates — fine for current data but worth noting.
Minor: fmtDate slices first 16 chars and replaces T with space — assumes ISO format; non-ISO strings will render oddly. Low priority.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing backend data (4 quotes, 1 like)
context_for_next_testing_agent: OutreachActivityPage.jsx uses card-based responsive layout (flex-col sm:flex-row, min-w-0, flex-wrap). Verified: desktop shows 4 quote cards with handles [testuser, zhenjun_zhao, rainozhang, gregorschub] and 1 like card (@QFinancePapers / 'A Random Rule Model' by Avner Seror / 2603.04105v1). Mobile@390px: document.documentElement.scrollWidth == clientWidth == 390 (no overflow), first card bbox x=16 width=358 (fits inside 390). Search 'rainoz' → 1 card on both viewports. Tab badges show (4)/(1) correctly. Refresh spin and back-link nav to /admin/outreach both work. Console errors present are unrelated CSP-blocked analytics (gtag, cloudflareinsights) and an initial 401 before admin_token gets set on first load — these are pre-existing app-level behavior, not related to this page.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — original bug (table-based layout causing horizontal overflow on mobile) was fixed by main agent via conversion to div/flex card layout. Regression test confirms fix holds: mobile scrollWidth equals clientWidth at 390px, and card content wraps instead of clipping.
